You’re on a Gen2-only platform path (older CPU/board/backplane, or a riser/backplane/switch that is Gen2-only).

BIOS/firmware is forcing Gen2 globally (sometimes called “PCIe speed = Gen2”, “Compatibility mode”, “Mining mode”, “Above 4G decoding” combos, etc.).

You’re in a weird virtualization / passthrough situation (less likely here, since you’re reading real BDFs and seeing physical tree segments, but still possible).
